result.stdout:
trim an input dictionary file and output only messages and dependent fields on given message set.
./PureFix.ConsoleApp -d FIX50SP2.xml -T 0 1 2 3 4 5 A AE

tail a file and output as tag decoded resolving enums.
./PureFix.ConsoleApp -f logs/test_client-fix-log20241007.txt -d FIX50SP2.xml -t -o tags -L '|'

tail a file and output as json objects
./PureFix.ConsoleApp -f logs/test_client-fix-log20241007.txt -d FIX50SP2.xml -t -o json -L '|'

parse a fix52 log in decode tag format with no tail
./PureFix.ConsoleApp -f logs/test_client-fix-log20241007.txt -d FIX50SP2.xml -o tags -L '|'

parse a fix44 log in json format with no tail
./PureFix.ConsoleApp -f logs/test_client-fix-log20241007.txt -d FIX44.xml -o json -L '|'

parse a fix44 log in json format with no tail and exlude all msg type 0 - heartbeats
./PureFix.ConsoleApp -d FIX44.xml -f Data/examples/FIX.4.4/fixsim-examples.txt -o json -e -T 0 -L '|'

parse a fix44 log in json format with no tail and show as count frequency each message
./PureFix.ConsoleApp -d FIX44.xml -f Data/examples/FIX.4.4/fixsim-examples.txt -o counts -L '|'

parse a fix52 log in decode tag format with no tail and filter only msg type A
./PureFix.ConsoleApp -f logs/test_client-fix-log20241007.txt -d FIX50SP2.xml -o tags -T A -L '|'

parse a fix52 todays log in decode tag format with no tail and filter out hearbeat
./PureFix.ConsoleApp -f logs/test_client-fix-log$(date '+%Y%m%d').txt -d FIX50SP2.xml -o json -e -T 0 -L '|'

run built in skeleton client and server to logon and heartbeat
./PureFix.ConsoleApp -d FIX50SP2.xml -A test-qf52-acceptor.json -a sk

run built in skeleton client and server to logon and heartbeat with fix44 config
./PureFix.ConsoleApp -d FIX44.xml -I test-qf44-initiator.json -A test-qf44-acceptor.json -a sk

run built in trade capture client and server to logon and heartbeat
./PureFix.ConsoleApp -d FIX50SP2.xml -A test-qf52-acceptor.json -a tc

run built in skeleton connect to fixsim.com
./PureFix.ConsoleApp -d FIX44.xml -I fixsim-qf44-initiator.json -a sk

generate code from a set of dict files
./PureFix.ConsoleApp -D FIX44.xml FIX43.xml FIX42.xml FIX50SP2.xml -g
result.stderr:
PureFix.ConsoleApp 0.2.10-beta+88422cfa9346858acfbf8c3e5dccc51af7511cc9
Copyright (C) 2026 TimelordUK

  -f, --fix            parse fix log into json or tags

  -d, --dict           dictionary xml file.

  -D, --dicts          list of dict xml to generate

  -o, --output         (Default: tags) output tags | json

  -a, --application    test app

  -t, --tail           tail the fix log and decode

  -I, --initiator      (Default: test-qf52-initiator.json) initiator json config

  -A, --acceptor       acceptor json config

  -g, --generate       generate types for dictionary

  -p, --path           (Default: .) output path of generator

  -L, --delimiter      (Default: 1) delimiter to parse a log

  -T, --trim           list of message types 0 1 2 3 4 5 AE

  -e, --exclude        (Default: false) msgtypes to exclude rather than include
                       when parsing log

  -n, --nuget          Use NuGet package references instead of project
                       references

  -v, --pkg-version    (Default: 0.1.0-alpha) Package version to reference when
                       using --nuget

  -N, --namespace      Custom namespace for generated types (default:
                       PureFix.Types.{DictName})

  --help               Display this help screen.

  --version            Display version information.
